payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: brown wooden cabinet door lower edge
payload.long_description: Lower section of a brown stained wooden cabinet door showing a recessed rectangular panel and a vertical seam; matte finish with light scuffs and wear. The image is edge-cropped at the bottom so the cabinet is partial in the frame and the very bottom/floor is visible, suggesting the cabinet is close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away). No knob or hardware is visible in this crop.
